final:
module synchronous_clear_register(
	input clk,
	input clear,
	input [15:0] data_in,
	output reg [15:0] data_out);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
	if (clear)
		data_out <= 16'b0;
	else
		data_out <= data_in;
end

endmodule
